assertions.assertion: Program.cs uses different connection strings for configuration store and operational store
assertions.rationale: ConfigDb and OpsDb are used separately.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets DefaultSchema = 'config' or similar on the configuration store options
assertions.rationale: No DefaultSchema is set on either store.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets DefaultSchema = 'ops' or similar on the operational store options
Program.cs calls MigrationsHistoryTable for at least one of the stores with a custom table name and schema
appsettings.json contains both ConfigDb and OpsDb connection strings under ConnectionStrings
assertions.rationale: Both connection strings are in appsettings.json.
